name: harness-next
description: 面向本地编码 Agent 的声明式 Workflow 编译与校验工具。

scripts.check:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.doctor: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js doctor
scripts.workflow:validate: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js validate
scripts.workflow:diagram: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js diagram
scripts.workflow:image: npm run build --silent && node dist/cli.js image
